title: tephroseris tundricola var. pseudoaurantiaca
intro: Tephroseris tundricola var. pseudoaurantiaca is an alpine plant species, commonly known as a type of daisy-like flowering plant, found in mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a potential remedy for wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Tephroseris tundricola var. pseudoaurantiaca include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in traditional medicine, where it is typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or applied topically as a poultice.
